title: splitter operation
description: Stream splitter: divides one inlet into several outlets by the user-supplied split fractions (which must sum to 1).  All branches share the same temperature, pressure and composition as the inlet -- this is a flow split, NOT a separation (contrast the gasSolidSplitter, which spec-splits solids but likewise does not classify by size).

fractions.title: Split fractions
fractions.description: Per-outlet split fraction (one entry per output stream).  Must sum to 1; each entry in [0, 1].  The ordering matches the `outputs` list.
